title: HUT Stock Earnings: Hut 8 Mining Beats EPS, Misses Revenue for Q2 2024
text: Hut 8 Mining reported mixed results for Q2 2024: EPS exceeded expectations at 2 cents per share, surpassing the analyst forecast of -3 cents. Revenue came in at $35.22 million, significantly underperforming analyst projections of $65.47 million—a shortfall of approximately 46%. The mining firm demonstrated contrasting performance with profitability improvements on EPS but dramatic revenue miss. The divergence between EPS and revenue performance suggests investors should investigate underlying drivers. Operational Metrics: Revenue increased 72% to $35.2 million compared to the prior year period. Digital Assets Mining segment gross margins rose to 46% from 34% year-over-year. Hut 8 mined 279 Bitcoin during the quarter. Company held 9,102 self-mined Bitcoin as of June 30, 2024, valued at approximately $570.5 million. The earnings report was released on August 13, 2024, and the significant gap between EPS and revenue performance raised questions about sustainability.
